generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR point cloud sensor for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]
instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera for 3D perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tachometer providing vehicle speed telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedTelemetryTransmitted
]
instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring vehicle steering state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTelemetryTransmitted
]
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]
instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]
instance SpeedTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data collected at ~10 Hz"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]
instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
]
instance SpeedTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedTelemetryTransmitted
]
instance SteeringAngleTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTelemetryTransmitted
]
instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]
instance HistoricalTelemetrySeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical telemetry time-series for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation FE converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]
instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation FE"
]
instance EmergencyBrakeActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking commands transmitted to vehicle drive system"
]
instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection FE gathering telemetry every perception cycle (~10 Hz) via ROS2 DDS"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringAndReportingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE performing DBSCAN clustering, Kalman filtering, ACC algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:enables OffloadingComputationsService, HistoricalTelemetryReportService
]
instance AccAlgorithmFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm FE following ISO 15622 performance class I implemented in ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables OffloadingComputationsService
]
instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UI visualization FE handling 3D rendering and path projection"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTime3DVisualizationService
]
instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reporting FE generating historical telemetry reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalTelemetryReportService
]
instance RemoteManagementFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote management FE providing enable/disable ACC, adjust speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]
instance TelemetryDatabaseFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database FE storing telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringAndReportingService, HistoricalTelemetryReportService
]
instance SimulationModelFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implicit 3D simulation model FE"
]
instance LiDARPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LiDAR point‑cloud clustering using DBSCAN"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]
instance KalmanFilterTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]
instance AccAlgorithmISO15622 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm following ISO 15622 performance class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccAlgorithmFE
]
instance VehicleStateVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Vehicle state visualization model for 3D rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
]
instance ThreeDRendererModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model using NVIDIA Jetson libraries"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
]
instance SqlTelemetryDatabase : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database model for storing telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TelemetryDatabaseFE
]
instance Simulation3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implicit 3D simulation model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationModelFE
]
instance DataMonitoringAndReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehiclePerformanceInsight, VehicleHealthNotificationInsight
]
instance RealTime3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time 3D visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehiclePerformanceInsight
]
instance OffloadingComputationsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccParameterAdjustmentInsight
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote interface to enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed, issue emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableAccAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, IssueEmergencyBrakingAction
]
instance HistoricalTelemetryReportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation of historical telemetry as time‑series"
    DTDFVocab:provides TelemetryHistoryInsight
]
instance VehiclePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time vehicle performance insights via UI"
]
instance VehicleHealthNotificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifications on vehicle health based on telemetry"
]
instance AccParameterAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for adjusting ACC parameters"
]
instance TelemetryHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical telemetry insights and trends"
]
instance EnableDisableAccAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust desired speed of the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance IssueEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to issue emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
]

    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano compute platform"
]
instance JetsonNXAnt : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Jetson NX antenna for wireless connectivity"
]
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor drive"
]

    base:desc "ROS2 middleware using DDS protocol"
]
instance NvidiaJetPackSDK : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack SDK for Jetson Orin Nano"
]
instance JetsonOrinNanoFirmware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Firmware for NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime for rapid prototyping"
]
instance MatlabSimulink : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex perception modules"
]
instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Public GitHub repository hosting source code"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC computation performed in the DT generates a desired speed command, which is transmitted back to the PT over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 messages and applied through the Motor Actuation FE. Remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, override speed, emergency brake) are also sent from the DT’s User Entity to the PT’s Physical Twin Entity’s Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data acquisition and command dissemination with an end‑to‑end latency requirement of ≤100 ms (≈10 Hz). Clock synchronization across DT components maintained within 100 ms to ensure consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Three entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) interconnected via ROS2 DDS over Wi‑Fi. The Physical Twin Entity hosts actual sensors and actuators; the Digital Twin Entity comprises functional entities (Data Collection, Data Storage, Reporting, ACC Control, Data Translation); the User Entity renders a 3‑D visualization and a control panel. The constellation is orchestrated by Data Translation FE that serializes and unit‑converts data across entities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (conceptual architecture), Manufacturing (physical vehicle built and retrofitted), and Operation (runtime usage for monitoring, remote management, and behavior analysis). The DT captures the vehicle’s behavior during the Operational stage and is updated during development."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time fidelity ensured by the 100 ms latency limit and 100 ms clock synchronization. DBSCAN clustering accuracy for object detection, Kalman filter for tracking; ACC algorithm validated against ISO 15622. Data translation FE ensures unit consistency, and SQL storage preserves historical integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication uses a Wi‑Fi network (IEEE 802.11) with ROS2 DDS (RTPS) for message transport. The DT entity and Physical Twin communicate over 802.11 Wi‑Fi; data serialized via DDS."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosted on a cloud/edge server; Physical Twin’s ROS2 nodes run on the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano; User Entity runs on the operator’s workstation or a remote desktop. All components communicate over the vehicle’s Wi‑Fi network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC control, ROS2 middleware (DDS), optional OPC UA for data translation per ISO 23247."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Compliance with safety‑critical requirements: end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms, 100 ms clock sync, remote command execution controlled via UI to avoid unsafe states. The DT is designed following ISO 23247 to support safety‑critical behavior but specific cybersecurity mechanisms such as encryption or authentication are not detailed in the document."
]
